definitions.text: A people; a tribe or nation; the inhabitants of a region, especially the native inhabitants.

examples: There were a lot of folk in the streets.
Young folk, old folk, everybody come / To our little Sunday School, and have a lot of fun.
I need to call my folks back home.

definitions.text: Of or pertaining to the inhabitants of a land, their culture, tradition, or history.
Of or pertaining to common people as opposed to ruling classes or elites.
Of or related to local building materials and styles.
